name: Artichoke Chili Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1 can (4 oz) green chili peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare tortilla chips for dipping.
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine artichokes, cheese, peppers, and mayonnaise.
3. Transfer the mixture to an 8-inch round baking dish.
4. Bake, uncovered, in a 350-degree oven for 20 minutes.
5. Serve warm with tortilla chips.
